# SCORE BOSS Resource Index and Routing Map

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

Master BOSS Library index for SCORE national and SCORE Houston resources. Use this file to understand the structure of the SCORE resource pack and choose the right resource document for an entrepreneur.

## When to surface

Surface when the user's question concerns accounting, artificial intelligence, business planning during Ideation, Validation, Formation and this source is relevant to the next document or human handoff.

## Key information

- ## BOSS Library tags
- score, resource-index, boss-routing, houston, 77084, all-stages

- Master BOSS Library index for SCORE national and SCORE Houston resources. Use this file to understand the structure of the SCORE resource pack and choose the right resource document for an entrepreneur.
- ## How the BOSS AI Librarian should use this resource
- ## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stage
- All stages: Ideation, Validation, Formation, Launch, Mature Operations, Growth, Recovery/Troubleshooting, and Exit/Transition.

## People and links

- Organizations: SCORE, SCORE Houston
- Link: <https://www.score.org/>

## Next handoff

Open the cited source link when available and route follow-up to SCORE or the named qualified resource.

## Guardrails

- The BOSS Libraries Librarian retrieves and routes information; it is not a mentor or a substitute for a qualified professional.
- Do not make final legal, tax, accounting, lending, certification, procurement, or compliance decisions for the user.
- Verify live pages for current eligibility, deadlines, contacts, prices, and program rules before presenting them as current.
